label: Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification

node.label: Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification
node.definition: Distillation transfers behavior from a teacher to a smaller student, while pruning removes low-value weights, channels, heads, experts, or activations.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives and feeding downstream nodes such as Quantized inference & compressed deployment, Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment.
examples: atlas downstream link to Quantized inference & compressed deployment
atlas downstream link to Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification has a `uses` dependency on Supervised learning because Supervised learning is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives because Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.

In this atlas graph, Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification has a `uses` dependency on Affine transforms & dense layers because Affine transforms & dense layers is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification has a `uses` dependency on Optimization theory because Optimization theory is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
